projectDescription: Jobr builds, deploys, and manages custom AI employees that take over repetitive, high-volume business roles — from customer support and lead response to invoice processing and collections.
keyFeatures: Custom-built AI employees tailored to each client's workflows and tone
Done-for-you deployment and ongoing management by Jobr
Human escalation with configurable guardrails and thresholds
Six core role types: Customer Support, Lead Response & Qualification, Invoice Processing, Collections, Scheduling, Resume Screening
Daily activity reports showing tasks handled and escalations
Fast onboarding — working AI employee live in weeks, not quarters
